caption: A man with a silver-grey wig, glasses, and headphones sits in a studio setting, speaking into a professional microphone. He wears a white button-down shirt with suspenders and a small red bow tie. The background consists of a white wall adorned with numerous framed photographs and clothing items, including a garment with a "LEE" tag. To his left and right, on-screen graphics display the text "BOSS TALK JOY" and "PODCAST" alongside a microphone icon. As the scene progresses, the man is captured mid-speech, with his mouth open and gaze shifting slightly, while his posture remains relatively still. The camera angle remains constant, focusing on his upper body and head, capturing the subtle movements of his facial expressions as he talks.
